mapper.select: select id, username, password, age, avatar, gender, create_time, update_time, department_id, email, phone, position, is_deleted from user where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select id, username, password, age, avatar, gender, create_time, update_time, department_id, email, phone, position, is_deleted from user where is_deleted = 0
select id, username, password, age, avatar, gender, create_time, update_time, department_id, email, phone, position, is_deleted from user where username = #{username} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into user (id, username, password, age, avatar, gender, department_id, email, phone, position, is_deleted) values (#{id}, #{username}, #{password}, #{age}, #{avatar}, #{gender}, #{departmentId}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{position}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.update: update user set username = #{username}, password = #{password}, age = #{age}, avatar = #{avatar}, gender = #{gender}, department_id = #{departmentId}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, position = #{position}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{id}
update user set is_deleted = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, username, password, age, avatar, gender, create_time, update_time, department_id, email, phone, position, is_deleted from user where department_id = #{departmentId} and is_deleted = 0 order by create_time desc
